# Commands: UFactory XArm6

Generated by `/v1b1-protocol UFactory XArm6 dll tests/smoke/inputs/xarm-wrapper-init.pyi` on 2026-04-25. 5 entries, keyed to v1b1 transport form `sdk-wrapper`. Source: `tests/smoke/inputs/xarm-wrapper-init.pyi` (5-method subset of the upstream xArm-Python-SDK 1.13.30 `XArmAPI` class). Drops into a `v1b1-author`-emitted scaffold's sdk-wrapper slot at `XArm6<Capability>Backend.<method>` bodies — call `self.driver._call_sdk(self._arm.<sdk-method>, ..., op="<op-name>")` per the xArm6 v1b1 idiom.

## MotionEnable

**Verb / Opcode**: XArmAPI.motion_enable

**Transport form**: sdk-wrapper

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| enable | bool | enable (`True`) or disable (`False`) motion; defaults to `True` |
| servo_id | int or None | joint index 1..7; `None` means apply to all joints |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| code | int | `0` = success; non-zero = SDK error code (see vendor docs for the table) |

**Side effects**: Enable or disable motion on one or all joints. Required before any motion command. Pairs with `set_mode` (sets control mode) and `set_state` (transitions ready state).

## SetGripperPosition

**Verb / Opcode**: XArmAPI.set_gripper_position

**Transport form**: sdk-wrapper

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| pos | float | target opening position; units are millimeters; range depends on attached gripper |
| wait | bool | block until target reached when `True`; defaults to `False` |
| speed | float or None | gripper speed; `None` uses the SDK default |
| auto_enable | bool | when `True`, enables the gripper if not already enabled; defaults to `False` |
| timeout | float or None | seconds; only honored when `wait=True` |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| code | int | `0` = success; non-zero = SDK error code |

**Side effects**: Command the standard xArm gripper to a target opening position. When `wait=True`, blocks until the gripper reaches `pos` or `timeout` elapses.

## SetMode

**Verb / Opcode**: XArmAPI.set_mode

**Transport form**: sdk-wrapper

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| mode | int | 0 = position, 1 = servo, 2 = joint teaching, 3 = Cartesian teaching, 4 = simulation, 5 = velocity; defaults to `0` |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| code | int | `0` = success; non-zero = SDK error code |

**Side effects**: Set the arm's control mode. Must be issued before `set_state(0)`.

## SetServoAngle

**Verb / Opcode**: XArmAPI.set_servo_angle

**Transport form**: sdk-wrapper

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| servo_id | int or None | joint index 1..7; `None` means use the `angle` list |
| angle | float or list[float] or None | degrees (or radians, see `is_radian`); per-joint when `servo_id` is None |
| speed | float or None | deg/sec (or rad/sec); `None` uses the last-used joint speed |
| mvacc | float or None | acceleration deg/sec² (or rad/sec²); `None` uses the last-used joint acc |
| relative | bool | when `True`, `angle` is treated as delta from current pose; defaults to `False` |
| is_radian | bool or None | when `None`, uses the SDK's `default_is_radian` |
| wait | bool | block until motion completes when `True`; defaults to `False` |
| timeout | float or None | seconds; only honored when `wait=True` |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| code | int | `0` = success; non-zero = SDK error code (see vendor docs for the table) |

**Side effects**: Move one or more joints to the target angle. When `servo_id` is None, `angle` is interpreted as a per-joint list. When `wait=True`, blocks until motion completes or `timeout` elapses; otherwise returns as soon as the motion is queued.

## SetState

**Verb / Opcode**: XArmAPI.set_state

**Transport form**: sdk-wrapper

**Confidence**: confirmed

**Request shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| state | int | 0 = ready (motion permitted), 3 = paused, 4 = stopped; defaults to `0` |

**Response shape**:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| code | int | `0` = success; non-zero = SDK error code |

**Side effects**: Transition the arm's ready state. Always issue after `set_mode` to arm the controller.
